title: poa lanuginosa var. neuquina
intro: Poa lanuginosa var. neuquina is a variety of the Poa lanuginosa plant, commonly known as the hairy meadowgrass, which is a type of grass native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Poa lanuginosa var. neuquina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
